scripts.pm2:dh:auto-replies:restart: pm2 startOrRestart deploy/pm2/ecosystem.config.cjs --only dh-auto-replies --update-env && pm2 save
scripts.pm2:dh:greetings:restart: pm2 startOrRestart deploy/pm2/ecosystem.config.cjs --only dh-greetings --update-env && pm2 save
scripts.pm2:dh:followups:restart: pm2 startOrRestart deploy/pm2/ecosystem.config.cjs --only dh-followups --update-env && pm2 save
scripts.pm2:dh:matches:restart: pm2 startOrRestart deploy/pm2/ecosystem.config.cjs --only dh-matches --update-env && pm2 save
scripts.pm2:dh:stop: pm2 stop dh-auto-replies dh-greetings dh-followups dh-matches || true
scripts.pm2:dh:delete: pm2 delete dh-auto-replies dh-greetings dh-followups dh-matches || true
scripts.pm2:dh:logs: pm2 logs dh-auto-replies dh-greetings dh-followups dh-matches
